'''haruhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oologist|oologist]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-r-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oologist|oologist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| haruhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hærihith|hærihith]] || [[word:hærihij|hærihij]] || [[word:hærihish|hærihish]] || [[word:hærihi|hærihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:haruruhuth|haruruhuth]] || [[word:haruruhuj|haruruhuj]] || [[word:haruruhush|haruruhush]] || [[word:haruruhu|haruruhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:haruhuth|haruhuth]] || [[word:haruhuj|haruhuj]] || [[word:haruhush|haruhush]] || [[word:haruhu|haruhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:harufhuth|harufhuth]] || [[word:harufhuj|harufhuj]] || [[word:harufhush|harufhush]] || [[word:harufhuf|harufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:haruhuthu|haruhuthu]] || [[word:haruhuju|haruhuju]] || [[word:haruhushu|haruhushu]] || [[word:haruhuku|haruhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:haruhuth|haruhuth]] || [[word:haruhuj|haruhuj]] || [[word:haruhush|haruhush]] || [[word:haruhu|haruhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:haruhuthul|haruhuthul]] || [[word:haruhujul|haruhujul]] || [[word:haruhushul|haruhushul]] || [[word:haruhukul|haruhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:haruhuthuthu|haruhuthuthu]] || [[word:haruhujuju|haruhujuju]] || [[word:haruhushushu|haruhushushu]] || [[word:haruhuku|haruhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:haruhuthun|haruhuthun]] || [[word:haruhujun|haruhujun]] || [[word:haruhushun|haruhushun]] || [[word:haruhukun|haruhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:haruhuthuoro|haruhuthuoro]] || [[word:haruhujuoro|haruhujuoro]] || [[word:haruhushuoro|haruhushuoro]] || [[word:haruhukuoro|haruhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
